channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Pixel Forge JAM #2 [PRIZES] Hosted by PIXEL FORGE Â· #PixelForgeJam 3 Joined Overview Community Submissions open from 2026-06-27 09:30:00 to 2026-07-04 09:30:00 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam Welcome to the Pixel Forge a 1-week game jam where developer
